title: veekaybee - Overview
text:
I build scalable distributed machine learning systems in personalization, recommendations, and search. I like reverse-engineering neural nets, MLOps and production, and machine learning systems. I've worked with inference and eval of large language models. Here's a reading list I made.
- GitFeed, streaming GitHub links using Bluesky Jetstream
- Lumigator, evals for LLMs
- Viberary, which recommended you books based on vibe.
- Awesome Twitter Algo
- A paper about embeddings
- Normconf, a data conference
- 📫 Email: vickiboykis@gmail.com
- 📫 Online: vickiboykis.com
